use_cases: Interactive thermal visualization for product showcases
Logo presentation with animated heat-map shader effect
Hero section visual effect for landing pages
Creative portfolio element with responsive heat overlay
Interactive demo component for design tool presentations
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based thermal effect component built with Three.js that renders an animated heat-map overlay. Features customizable logo integration, real-time thermal blending, and smooth animation with hover-triggered heat interactions. Designed for creative showcases and interactive landing pages requiring dynamic visual effects.
